title: My Friendly Pet Pals
description: A simple coloring page featuring three common pets with clean outlines perfect for young artists to color and learn about pet animals.
instructions: Color the cat, dog, and rabbit using your favorite colors. Try to stay inside the lines!

content.image: Three pet animals arranged in a friendly scene - a cat sitting with its tail curled, a dog with floppy ears standing, and a rabbit with long ears sitting beside them. All outlines are simple, clean single lines with no intricate details.
learningFacts: Cats like to clean themselves with their tongues
Dogs need daily exercise and walks
Rabbits have strong back legs for hopping
Pets need fresh water every day
All pets need love and care from their owners
